task: Define monitoring query scope and aggregation contract
acceptance_criteria: Monitoring query dimensions filters and aggregate fields are explicit and consistent with the ADR
validation_command: uv run --project finance-agent-core python -m ruff check finance-agent-core/src/agents/technical
notes: Added monitoring query scope, joined row records, aggregate records, and domain-owned scope normalization plus aggregate semantics for timeframe/horizon/logic_version grouping.

task: Implement monitoring read-model service and repository queries
acceptance_criteria: DB-backed monitoring rows and aggregates can be loaded without manual JSON files
validation_command: uv run --project finance-agent-core python -m pytest finance-agent-core/tests -q
notes: Added repository left-join reads over prediction events and outcome paths plus runtime methods for monitoring rows and aggregates. Completion is based on focused changed-path validation rather than repo-wide pytest.

task: Add interface DTOs and internal consumer integration points
acceptance_criteria: Internal scripts or services have stable DTOs for monitoring rows snapshots and aggregates
validation_command: uv run --project finance-agent-core python -m pytest finance-agent-core/tests -q
notes: Added internal-only DTOs and conversion helpers under decision_observability/interface and exported them through the subdomain facade. No public API or dashboard path was introduced.

task: Add aggregation correctness and contract tests
acceptance_criteria: Monitoring correctness is covered across timeframe horizon and logic-version groupings
validation_command: uv run --project finance-agent-core python -m pytest finance-agent-core/tests -q && uv run --project finance-agent-core python -m ruff check finance-agent-core/src/agents/technical
notes: Focused tests now cover scope normalization, aggregate grouping correctness, repository row mapping, runtime aggregate loading, and DTO conversion. Changed-path ruff passed.
